parameters.sqlQuery:
WITH hs AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN DATE_TRUNC(date,MONTH)=DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 1 MONTH),MONTH) THEN 'prior_month'
      WHEN DATE_TRUNC(date,MONTH)=DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH) THEN 'this_month'
    END AS period,
    qoyod_source AS channel,
    SUM(leads_total) AS leads,
    SUM(leads_qualified) AS sqls
  FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.hubspot_leads_module_daily`
  WHERE date >= DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 1 MONTH),MONTH)
  GROUP BY period, qoyod_source
),
spend AS (
  SELECT
    channel,
    CASE
      WHEN DATE_TRUNC(date,MONTH)=DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 1 MONTH),MONTH) THEN 'prior_month'
      WHEN DATE_TRUNC(date,MONTH)=DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH) THEN 'this_month'
    END AS period,
    SUM(spend) AS spend
  FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.campaigns_daily`
  WHERE date >= DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 1 MONTH),MONTH)
  GROUP BY channel, period
)
SELECT s.channel, s.period,
  ROUND(s.spend,2) AS spend,
  COALESCE(hs.leads,0) AS leads,
  COALESCE(hs.sqls,0) AS sqls,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(s.spend,NULLIF(COALESCE(hs.leads,0),0)),2) AS cpl,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(s.spend,NULLIF(COALESCE(hs.sqls,0),0)),2) AS cpql,
  'compare' AS _query
FROM spend s
LEFT JOIN hs ON s.channel = hs.channel AND s.period = hs.period
WHERE s.period IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY s.channel, s.period

WITH hs AS (
  SELECT qoyod_source AS channel,
    SUM(leads_total) AS leads,
    SUM(leads_qualified) AS sqls
  FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.hubspot_leads_module_daily`
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC(date,MONTH) = DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH)
  GROUP BY qoyod_source
),
spend AS (
  SELECT channel, SUM(spend) AS spend
  FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.campaigns_daily`
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC(date,MONTH) = DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH)
  GROUP BY channel
)
SELECT s.channel,
  ROUND(s.spend,2) AS mtd_spend,
  COALESCE(hs.leads,0) AS mtd_leads,
  COALESCE(hs.sqls,0) AS mtd_sqls,
  DATE_DIFF(LAST_DAY(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh')),DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH),DAY)+1 AS days_in_month,
  DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH),DAY)+1 AS days_elapsed,
  ROUND(s.spend/(DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH),DAY)+1)
    *(DATE_DIFF(LAST_DAY(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh')),DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH),DAY)+1),0) AS proj_spend_eom,
  ROUND(COALESCE(hs.leads,0)/(DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH),DAY)+1)
    *(DATE_DIFF(LAST_DAY(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh')),DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH),DAY)+1),0) AS proj_leads_eom,
  'forecast' AS _query
FROM spend s
LEFT JOIN hs ON s.channel = hs.channel
ORDER BY mtd_spend DESC

WITH hs AS (
  SELECT LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) AS k,
    qoyod_source AS channel,
    SUM(leads_total) AS leads,
    SUM(leads_qualified) AS sqls,
    SUM(leads_disqualified) AS disq
  FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.hubspot_leads_module_daily`
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC(date,MONTH) = DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH)
  GROUP BY LOWER(lead_utm_campaign), qoyod_source
),
spend AS (
  SELECT channel, LOWER(campaign_name) AS k, campaign_name,
    SUM(spend) AS spend
  FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.campaigns_daily`
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC(date,MONTH) = DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH)
  GROUP BY channel, LOWER(campaign_name), campaign_name
)
SELECT s.channel, s.campaign_name,
  COALESCE(hs.leads,0) AS leads,
  COALESCE(hs.sqls,0) AS sqls,
  COALESCE(hs.disq,0) AS disq,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(COALESCE(hs.sqls,0),NULLIF(COALESCE(hs.leads,0),0))*100,1) AS qual_rate_pct,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(COALESCE(hs.disq,0),NULLIF(COALESCE(hs.leads,0),0))*100,1) AS disq_rate_pct,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(s.spend,NULLIF(COALESCE(hs.sqls,0),0)),2) AS cpql,
  'cro' AS _query
FROM spend s
LEFT JOIN hs ON s.k = hs.k
WHERE COALESCE(hs.leads,0) >= 5
ORDER BY qual_rate_pct ASC LIMIT 20

SELECT channel,
  ROUND(SUM(spend),2) AS spend,
  ROUND(SUM(revenue_won),2) AS revenue_won,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(revenue_won),NULLIF(SUM(spend),0)),2) AS roas,
  0 AS leads,
  0 AS deals_won,
  'roas' AS _query
FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.paid_channel_daily`
WHERE DATE_TRUNC(date,MONTH) = DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH)
GROUP BY channel ORDER BY roas DESC

SELECT action AS action_type,campaign_name AS target_name,channel,DATE(ts,'Asia/Riyadh') AS event_date,status AS outcome,DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),DATE(ts,'Asia/Riyadh'),DAY) AS days_since,'monitor' AS _query FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.agent_activity_log` WHERE DATE(ts,'Asia/Riyadh')>=DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 30

parameters.jsCode: const rows=$input.all().map(i=>i.json),compare=rows.filter(r=>r._query==='compare'),forecast=rows.filter(r=>r._query==='forecast'),cro=rows.filter(r=>r._query==='cro'),roas=rows.filter(r=>r._query==='roas'),monitor=rows.filter(r=>r._query==='monitor'),today=new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US',{timeZone:'Asia/Riyadh',month:'long',year:'numeric'});return[{json:{system:'You are Nexa, Qoyod paid media agent. Strategic analysis: MoM trends, CRO quality, ROAS by channel, top strategic actions.',messages:[{role:'user',content:JSON.stringify({compare,forecast,cro,roas,monitor})}],tools:[{name:'monthly_digest',description:'Monthly performance digest',input_schema:{type:'object',required:['digest','actions'],properties:{digest:{type:'string'},actions:{type:'array',items:{type:'object',required:['title','description','priority'],properties:{title:{type:'string'},description:{type:'string'},priority:{type:'string',enum:['high','medium','low']},channel:{type:'string'},estimated_impact:{type:'string'}}}}}}}],tool_choice:{type:'any'}}}];

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT channel, ad_name, ad_id,
  SUM(clicks) AS clicks,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(clicks), NULLIF(SUM(impressions),0)),4) AS ctr,
  SUM(leads_total) AS leads,
  SUM(qualified) AS qualified_leads,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(qualified), NULLIF(SUM(leads_total),0)),4) AS qual_ratio,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(spend), NULLIF(SUM(leads_total),0)),2) AS cpl,
  ROUND(SUM(spend),2) AS spend
FROM `angular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.v_ad_performance`
WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
  AND leads_total > 0
GROUP BY channel, ad_name, ad_id
HAVING SUM(leads_total) >= 3
ORDER BY channel, qual_ratio DESC, cpl ASC

parameters.sqlQuery:
WITH hs AS (
  SELECT lead_utm_campaign, SUM(leads_total) AS leads, SUM(leads_qualified) AS sqls
  FROM `angular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.hubspot_leads_module_daily`
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC(date, MONTH) = DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), MONTH)
  GROUP BY lead_utm_campaign
), lp AS (
  SELECT final_url, MIN(c.campaign_name) AS sample_campaign,
    SUM(c.spend) AS spend, SUM(c.clicks) AS clicks,
    SUM(COALESCE(h.leads,0)) AS leads, SUM(COALESCE(h.sqls,0)) AS sqls
  FROM `angular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.campaigns_daily` c
  LEFT JOIN hs h ON LOWER(c.campaign_name) = LOWER(h.lead_utm_campaign)
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC(c.date, MONTH) = DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), MONTH)
    AND c.final_url IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY final_url
)
SELECT final_url AS destination_url, sample_campaign,
  ROUND(spend,2) AS spend_usd, clicks, leads, sqls,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(leads,NULLIF(clicks,0))*100,2) AS cvr_pct,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(spend,NULLIF(sqls,0)),2) AS cpql_usd
FROM lp WHERE sqls > 0
ORDER BY sqls DESC LIMIT 1

WITH hs AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN DATE_TRUNC(date,MONTH)=DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 1 MONTH),MONTH) THEN 'prior_month'
      WHEN DATE_TRUNC(date,MONTH)=DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH) THEN 'this_month'
    END AS period,
    qoyod_source AS channel,
    SUM(leads_total) AS leads,
    SUM(leads_qualified) AS sqls
  FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.hubspot_leads_module_daily`
  WHERE date >= DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 1 MONTH),MONTH)
  GROUP BY period, qoyod_source
),
spend AS (
  SELECT
    channel,
    CASE
      WHEN DATE_TRUNC(date,MONTH)=DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 1 MONTH),MONTH) THEN 'prior_month'
      WHEN DATE_TRUNC(date,MONTH)=DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH) THEN 'this_month'
    END AS period,
    SUM(spend) AS spend
  FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.campaigns_daily`
  WHERE date >= DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),INTERVAL 1 MONTH),MONTH)
  GROUP BY channel, period
)
SELECT s.channel, s.period,
  ROUND(s.spend,2) AS spend,
  COALESCE(hs.leads,0) AS leads,
  COALESCE(hs.sqls,0) AS sqls,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(s.spend,NULLIF(COALESCE(hs.leads,0),0)),2) AS cpl,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(s.spend,NULLIF(COALESCE(hs.sqls,0),0)),2) AS cpql,
  'compare' AS _query
FROM spend s
LEFT JOIN hs ON s.channel = hs.channel AND s.period = hs.period
WHERE s.period IS NOT NULL

WITH hs AS (
  SELECT qoyod_source AS channel,
    SUM(leads_total) AS leads,
    SUM(leads_qualified) AS sqls
  FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.hubspot_leads_module_daily`
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC(date,MONTH) = DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH)

SELECT s.channel,

  DATE_DIFF(LAST_DAY(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh')),DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH),DAY)+1 AS days_in_month,
  DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH),DAY)+1 AS days_elapsed,

    *(DATE_DIFF(LAST_DAY(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh')),DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH),DAY)+1),0) AS proj_spend_eom,
  ROUND(COALESCE(hs.leads,0)/(DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH),DAY)+1)
    *(DATE_DIFF(LAST_DAY(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh')),DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH),DAY)+1),0) AS proj_leads_eom,
  'forecast' AS _query
FROM spend s
LEFT JOIN hs ON s.channel = hs.channel

WITH hs AS (
  SELECT LOWER(lead_utm_campaign) AS k,
    qoyod_source AS channel,
    SUM(leads_total) AS leads,
    SUM(leads_qualified) AS sqls,
    SUM(leads_disqualified) AS disq
  FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.hubspot_leads_module_daily`
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC(date,MONTH) = DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH)
  GROUP BY LOWER(lead_utm_campaign), qoyod_source
),
spend AS (

    SUM(spend) AS spend
  FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.campaigns_daily`
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC(date,MONTH) = DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH)

SELECT s.channel, s.campaign_name,
  COALESCE(hs.leads,0) AS leads,
  COALESCE(hs.sqls,0) AS sqls,

FROM spend s
LEFT JOIN hs ON s.k = hs.k
WHERE COALESCE(hs.leads,0) >= 5
ORDER BY qual_rate_pct ASC LIMIT 20

  ROUND(SUM(spend),2) AS spend,
  ROUND(SUM(revenue_won),2) AS revenue_won,

  0 AS deals_won,

FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.paid_channel_daily`
WHERE DATE_TRUNC(date,MONTH) = DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'),MONTH)
GROUP BY channel ORDER BY roas DESC

SELECT channel, ad_name, ad_id,
  SUM(clicks) AS clicks,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(clicks), NULLIF(SUM(impressions),0)),4) AS ctr,
  SUM(leads_total) AS leads,
  SUM(qualified) AS qualified_leads,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(qualified), NULLIF(SUM(leads_total),0)),4) AS qual_ratio,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(spend), NULLIF(SUM(leads_total),0)),2) AS cpl,

FROM `angular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.v_ad_performance`
WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
  AND leads_total > 0
GROUP BY channel, ad_name, ad_id
HAVING SUM(leads_total) >= 3
ORDER BY channel, qual_ratio DESC, cpl ASC

parameters.sqlQuery:
WITH hs AS (
  SELECT lead_utm_campaign, SUM(leads_total) AS leads, SUM(leads_qualified) AS sqls
  FROM `angular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.hubspot_leads_module_daily`
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC(date, MONTH) = DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), MONTH)
  GROUP BY lead_utm_campaign
), lp AS (
  SELECT final_url, MIN(c.campaign_name) AS sample_campaign,
    SUM(c.spend) AS spend, SUM(c.clicks) AS clicks,
    SUM(COALESCE(h.leads,0)) AS leads, SUM(COALESCE(h.sqls,0)) AS sqls
  FROM `angular-axle-492812-q4.qoyod_marketing.campaigns_daily` c
  LEFT JOIN hs h ON LOWER(c.campaign_name) = LOWER(h.lead_utm_campaign)
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC(c.date, MONTH) = DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Riyadh'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), MONTH)
    AND c.final_url IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY final_url
)
SELECT final_url AS destination_url, sample_campaign,
  ROUND(spend,2) AS spend_usd, clicks, leads, sqls,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(leads,NULLIF(clicks,0))*100,2) AS cvr_pct,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(spend,NULLIF(sqls,0)),2) AS cpql_usd
FROM lp WHERE sqls > 0
ORDER BY sqls DESC LIMIT 1
